nasb.text: And when King Hezekiah heard it, he tore his clothes, covered himself with sackcloth and entered the house of the Lord.

esv.text: As soon as King Hezekiah heard it, he tore his clothes and covered himself with sackcloth and went into the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 希西家王聽見了，就把自己的衣服撕裂，披上麻布，來到耶和華的殿。

ccb.text: 希西迦王听了就撕裂衣服，披上麻衣，进入耶和华的殿。
